The '''XQ5 Platform''' was designed by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] as a replacement for the [[XQ2 Platform]]. It had larger cargo bays and a larger upper docking bay on the central structure.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]] {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
